name: File Manager
description: High-performance file explorer to manage server directories and files.
changelog_en: v1.0.4: Sortable column headers (Name/Size/Date) in file table — click to sort asc, click again to toggle desc; folders always grouped above files. v1.0.3: When bookmark APIs are missing on the server (older backend), UI hides bookmark controls and shows an upgrade hint instead of a raw Not Found alert. v1.0.2: per-user JSON bookmarks (bookmarks_store).
changelog_vi: v1.0.4: Header cot co the sap xep (Ten/Kich thuoc/Ngay) — click de tang dan, click lai de giam dan; thu muc luon xep tren file. v1.0.3: Neu backend cu chua co API bookmark, giao dien an nut bookmark va hien huong dan cap nhat thay vi alert Not Found. v1.0.2: bookmark JSON theo user (bookmarks_store).

name: Web Manager
description: Nginx and Apache vhosts, LEMP/LAMP stack bootstrap, PHP-FPM overview, and smart DB admin tools.
changelog_en: v1.1.1: Remove the per-site PHP configuration tab from Web Manager; PHP tuning remains in PHP Manager. Other stack and vhost behavior unchanged.
changelog_vi: v1.1.1: Go tab cau hinh PHP theo tung site trong Web Manager; dieu chinh PHP tap trung o PHP Manager. Hanh vi vhost/stack khac giu nguyen.

name: Site Wizard
description: Provision a complete website (Nginx + DB + SSL) end-to-end in one flow.
changelog_en: v1.0.0: First AppStore release of the Site Wizard module (guided stack + vhost + database + SSL provisioning).
changelog_vi: v1.0.0: Phat hanh AppStore lan dau cho module Site Wizard (luong huong dan stack + vhost + database + SSL).

name: Database Manager
description: MySQL/MariaDB management and user creation.
changelog_en: v1.0.4: Restore MySQL/MariaDB list action to download gzip dumps (.sql.gz) via GET /dump-gzip (button was missing in 1.0.3 frontend). v1.0.3: size reporting and backend dump-gzip.
changelog_vi: v1.0.4: Khoi phuc nut tai ban dump .sql.gz tren danh sach MySQL/MariaDB (frontend 1.0.3 thieu). v1.0.3: hien thi dung luong va API dump-gzip phia backend.

name: Docker Manager
description: Manage containers, images, and stacks seamlessly.
changelog_en: v1.0.4: Compose scan results use a compact scrollable list with show/hide toggle. v1.0.3: View Logs modal shows newest log lines at the top.
changelog_vi: v1.0.4: Ket qua quet Compose hien dang bang danh sach gon, co cuon va nut an/hien. v1.0.3: Modal xem log hien thi dong log moi nhat o dau danh sach.

name: Download Manager
description: Web download manager: direct links, Google Drive/folders, custom file-hosting (curl/API), BitTorrent via aria2, watched torrent folder, speed limits, and Google OAuth. Now supports yt-dlp.
changelog_en: v0.2.11: Fix aria2 unrecognized option --pid-file error on older distributions. v0.2.10: Fix aria2 start exit code 28. Update yt-dlp unpinned for 403 Forbidden fixes. Add ffmpeg to merge formats.
changelog_vi: v0.2.11: Sua loi aria2 khong nhan tham so --pid-file tren he dieu hanh cu. v0.2.10: Sua loi aria2 exit code 28 khi start. Cap nhat yt-dlp ban moi nhat fix 403 Forbidden. Them ffmpeg de ghep video chat luong cao.

name: Audio Player
description: CoPanel music library: configurable folders (/home/music default), folder browse, metadata scan, album/artist/genre views, playlists, cover art, and HTML5 streaming playback.
changelog_en: v0.3.2: Fix AppStore install — add __init__.py, init on import, reliable hot-reload with CoPanel loader fix. If API 404 after install, run systemctl restart copanel. v0.3.1: Rebrand to Audio Player.
changelog_vi: v0.3.2: Sua cai AppStore — __init__.py, khoi tao khi import, hot-reload on dinh hon. Neu API 404 sau cai, chay systemctl restart copanel. v0.3.1: Doi ten Audio Player.

name: SSL Manager
description: Generate Let's Encrypt certificates automatically.
changelog_en: v1.0.2: Refactor SSL router error handling and harden frontend request headers to avoid sending invalid Bearer tokens.
changelog_vi: v1.0.2: Refactor xu ly loi trong SSL router va cung co header request frontend de tranh gui Bearer token khong hop le.

name: PHP Manager
description: Control local PHP versions and php.ini configurations.
changelog_en: v1.0.3: Detect installed PHP streams via dpkg Status (install ok installed) instead of orphan /etc/php/*/php.ini after remove; purge APT packages with config (deinstall ok config-files), second-pass grep purge for phpX.Y* and libapache2-mod-phpX.Y, post-check dpkg/binary before success; fixes false "still installed" after uninstall.
changelog_vi: v1.0.3: Nhan dien phien ban PHP qua trang thai dpkg (install ok installed), khong con dua vao file php.ini sot sau remove; purge goi APT kem cau hinh (deinstall ok config-files), vong hai purge theo ten phpX.Y* va libapache2-mod-phpX.Y, kiem tra lai dpkg/binary truoc khi bao thanh cong; sua loi van hien thi da cai sau khi go.

name: Terminal
description: Execute system commands securely in the browser.
changelog_en: v1.0.3: Auto-save custom snippets on add/remove (PUT /snippets); more built-ins (daemon-reload, nginx, UFW, Fail2Ban). v1.0.2: JSON snippet API.
changelog_vi: v1.0.3: Tu dong luu snippet khi them/xoa; them nhieu lenh co san (daemon-reload, nginx, UFW, Fail2Ban). v1.0.2: API snippet JSON.

name: Rsync Manager
description: SSH compatibility checks and rsync sync to a new VPS (CoPanel/web files). Optional; not core. SQL and Docker are manual.
changelog_en: v1.0.0: Initial AppStore module — POST /compatibility (arch, OS, rsync, optional disk vs estimate), POST /sync (dry-run or real), presets for CoPanel tree excludes.
changelog_vi: v1.0.0: Phien ban dau — API kiem tra tuong thich SSH, sync rsync (dry-run hoac that), preset loai tru cho cay CoPanel.

name: Backup Manager
description: Zero-CLI cloud backup manager powered by rclone. Includes guided Google OAuth onboarding, profile-based remote setup, cron scheduling, real-time sync watchdog, and live progress streaming.
changelog_en: v1.2.9: Fix cron execution by migrating from inline python to run_sync.py and setting explicit PATH for tools like mysqldump. v1.2.8: MySQL uploads now target remote_path/<dump>.sql.gz so a configured path ending in .sql no longer renames the object to .sql; gzip binary resolved via PATH or /usr/bin/gzip. v1.2.7: gzip dump before rclone.
changelog_vi: v1.2.9: Sửa lỗi cron không chạy bằng cách chuyển sang run_sync.py và truyền cứng biến PATH cho các công cụ như mysqldump. v1.2.8: Upload MySQL dat dich den remote_path/<file>.sql.gz — neu truoc day cau hinh ket thuc bang .sql thi rclone khong con doi ten thanh .sql nua; tim gzip qua PATH hoac /usr/bin/gzip. v1.2.7: nen gzip truoc khi rclone.

name: System Monitor
description: Real-time visibility into CPU, memory, and disk usage.
changelog_en: v1.1.2: Richer system header — CPU model (Linux /proc/cpuinfo, macOS sysctl), architecture, total RAM, aggregated disk totals by device (tmpfs etc. excluded); UI shows capacity breakdown. v1.1.1: process detail hardening.
changelog_vi: v1.1.2: Thong tin hero day hon — ten CPU, kien truc, tong RAM, tong dung luong o dia (gop theo thiet bi, bo qua tmpfs); hien chi tiet dung luong. v1.1.1: cung co chi tiet PID.

name: Storage Manager
description: Monitor disks and SMART health, MiniTool-style partition wizard, LVM pools, RAID, benchmarks, and maintenance.
changelog_en: v1.4.20: Fix disk Initialize — detect GPT/MBR after mklabel, unblock empty disks, show init errors in modal.
changelog_vi: v1.4.20: Sua Initialize o — nhan dien GPT/MBR sau mklabel, bo chan o trong, hien loi init trong modal.

name: ClamAV
description: Antivirus dashboard for signature updates, targeted malware scans, detections, and quarantine workflow.
changelog_en: v1.0.3: When clamav-freshclam service is active, restart service only (never spawn a second freshclam). Fallback JobCancelled import for older CoPanel core.
changelog_vi: v1.0.3: Khi clamav-freshclam dang chay chi restart service (khong goi freshclam thu hai). Fallback import JobCancelled neu core CoPanel cu.

name: Firewall
description: Visual dashboard for UFW firewall rules and Fail2Ban IDS with correct jail / banned-IP display.
changelog_en: v1.0.5: Fix Fail2Ban active-state detection with robust service/client fallbacks and add one-click enable action from the Firewall UI when Fail2Ban is installed but inactive.
changelog_vi: v1.0.5: Sua nhan dien trang thai hoat dong Fail2Ban on dinh hon (fallback service/client) va bo sung nut bat nhanh trong giao dien Firewall khi Fail2Ban da cai nhung dang inactive.

name: DNS Manager
description: Manage DNS zones and records using local storage or BIND backend.
changelog_en: v1.0.1: Improve reliability by using collision-resistant zone/record IDs and add frontend error handling for delete zone/record actions.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Tang do on dinh bang ID zone/record chong trung va bo sung xu ly loi tren frontend khi xoa zone/record.

name: Cloudflare DDNS
description: Dynamic DNS updates to Cloudflare, DNS record management via API, and Cloudflare Tunnel (cloudflared) configuration.
changelog_en: v1.0.5: Cron log lines in run_update.py; cd to backend in crontab; surface DDNS errors instead of silent fail. v1.0.4: auto-install cron.
changelog_vi: v1.0.5: Ghi log khi cron chay; cd backend trong crontab; hien loi DDNS thay vi nuot im. v1.0.4: tu cai cron.

name: WebDAV SMB
description: WebDAV and SMB file sharing on server IP:port. Login with the same username/password as the panel root (superadmin) account. Optional WebDAV root mount for http://IP:port/ without share path.
changelog_en: v1.0.6: Optional WebDAV root mount — access files at http://IP:port/ without /share-name/ in the URL. SMB still uses share name.
changelog_vi: v1.0.6: Tuy chon WebDAV mount tai root — truy cap http://IP:port/ khong can /ten-share/. SMB van dung ten share.

name: Cron Manager
description: Manage recurring task schedules with visual cron builder and command execution.
changelog_en: v1.0.5: Refactor crontab syncing logic to safely preserve blocks. v1.0.4: Add pause/start controls for managed cron jobs with DB-backed is_active state and crontab sync that only deploys active jobs.
changelog_vi: v1.0.5: Tối ưu logic đồng bộ crontab để giữ nguyên cấu trúc khối an toàn. v1.0.4: Bo sung nut pause/start cho cron job managed voi trang thai is_active luu trong DB va dong bo crontab chi trien khai job dang active.

name: AppStore Manager
description: Add, remove, and upgrade third-party modules seamlessly.
changelog_en: v1.0.28: Fix low-memory build heap (2048MB + chunk split, not 512MB). v1.0.27: AppStore install build retry on exit 139.
changelog_vi: v1.0.28: Sua heap build low-RAM (2048MB + tach chunk, khong dung 512MB). v1.0.27: Retry build khi exit 139.

name: System Cleaner
description: System Junk cleaner and Disk Analyzer (TreeSize clone) for optimizing storage.
changelog_en: v1.0.1: Fix white screen on first visit to /system-cleaner (remove React.lazy; eager module load like other modules). Sidebar Trash2 icon.
changelog_vi: v1.0.1: Sửa lỗi trang trắng lần đầu vào /system-cleaner (bỏ React.lazy, load module đồng bộ). Icon Trash2 trên sidebar.
